title: Cryptool is live on mainnet; MultiversX publicly confirms backing
content_html:
Cryptool is officially live on mainnet with three modules: Groups, Raise and GDS.

Alongside the launch, MultiversX has publicly confirmed their backing of Cryptool, with a statement from the official MultiversX account on X. The endorsement adds significant weight to the launch and signals deeper ecosystem support to come.

With the platform live, this is the right moment to onboard your community through the referral programme. The full Cryptool marketing push starts today across every channel, with regular updates over the coming weeks.
author: Cryptool
